tests.name: customer qr flow: menu -> cart -> place order -> status
tests.notes: Server unavailable due to port conflicts (3001)

tests.name: Customer Menu - should load menu page
Accessibility QA - Menu page - should have no critical accessibility violations
tests.notes: AXE integration mismatch - injectAxe API broken

tests.name: Accessibility QA - Menu page - should have proper landmark regions
Accessibility QA - Menu page - interactive elements should be keyboard accessible
Accessibility QA - Cart page - should have no critical accessibility violations
Accessibility QA - Order Status page - should have no critical accessibility violations
Accessibility QA - All pages - color contrast should meet WCAG AA standards
Accessibility - Focus Management - should show visible focus indicators
Accessibility - Screen Reader Landmarks - should have skip link or landmarks for navigation
Accessibility - Screen Reader Landmarks - should have properly labeled form inputs
Customer Menu - should display products in grid
Customer Menu - should filter by category
Customer Menu - should add item to cart
Customer Cart - should show empty cart message
Order Status - should show order status page
Offline Support - should show offline notice when cached

remediation: 1. Stabilize dev server - use a dedicated port (3001) for E2E tests and ensure it listens before running tests
2. Fix axe-core Playwright integration - review @axe-core/playwright installation and usage; replace injectAxe with correct API (axe.inject or similar)
3. Update Playwright config - ensure baseURL aligns with the running server port
4. Add port availability check in CI pipeline before running E2E tests
